'''Tasariq''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. It was a barren world with [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]-filled craters and [[tasar crystal]]s. Tasariq joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. It was later part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. [[Barimoq Industries]], a [[Tasari]]-run corporation that produced a variety of personal projectile weapons, was based on Tasariq. [[TasCorp]] was a Tasari business that primarily provided mining equipment, but also produced some weapons during the era of the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]].
